description: Status panels for Claude Code sessions and Ollama backends.
viewsContainer.title: Anytime Agent
viewsWelcome.mapping:
No Claude Code sessions detected.

The status file is written by the anytime-trail Claude Code hook.
Make sure the hook is installed.
viewsWelcome.aiNote:
[$(edit) Create AI Note](command:anytime-agent.openAiNote)
Share visual information (images, tables) with AI tools.
configuration.showUsage.markdownDescript: Show Claude Code subscription usage in the Agent Mapping Claude Code group.
configuration.usageRefreshSeconds.markdo: Refresh interval in seconds for Claude Code usage. Values below 300 seconds are clamped to 300. Usage responses are shared through a 10-minute global storage cache to avoid API rate limits.
configuration.claudeMdGuidance.markdownD: On activation, upsert a managed block into the workspace CLAUDE.md that makes the `anytime-dev-cycle` skill the default for development instructions. Only the marked block is ever rewritten; user content is never touched.
config.gitActivityRetentionDays.descript: Number of days to keep git activity records in the agent-status DB. Records older than this are pruned when the worker starts.
config.workSnapshotIntervalMinutes.descr: Interval in minutes for taking a non-destructive snapshot of uncommitted work (including untracked files) into `refs/anytime/snapshots/`. Set to 0 to disable. Values between 1 and 4 are treated as 5.
config.workSnapshotRetentionDays.descrip: Number of days to keep work snapshot refs before pruning them.
configuration.tickets.directory.markdown: Location of the ticket repository used by the anytime-ticket-loop skill (root of a local clone, or the .tickets/ directory; absolute or workspace-relative). When unset, resolution falls back to .tickets/ at the workspace root, then the ANYTIME_TICKETS_DIR environment variable.
